question: EMI not debited on time
answer: Delay in Instalment debit can be due to technical issue or delay from bank side. We kindly request you to wait for some time, as the instalment amount will be debited from your account shortly. Please ensure that sufficient balance is maintained in your bank account.

question: I want to cancel my loan
answer: You can cancel your loan within 1 day of disbursement by selecting the loan in 'Your relations,' clicking 'Cancel Loan,' choosing your cancellation reason, and if any disbursement was received, returning the amount by making a payment through your preferred method. If you are unable to cancel the loan online, you will need to raise a request with us. If the cancel option is unavailable, you are not eligible for loan cancellation. CTA Label: Raise a Request, Android CTA link: bajajsuperapp://helpsupport/raisedrequest, IOS CTA link: bajajsuperapp://helpsupport/raisedrequest, Web CTA link: https://bajajfinserv.in/myaccountlogin?Source=RAR,

question: I have applied loan, when it will be approved
answer: We appreciate your interest. Normally, the processing of a loan application takes between 5-7 days. If you haven't heard back within this time frame, it could indicate that the application has been rejected.

question: When can I pay my advance EMI?
answer: You have the option to make an advance payment towards your loan. Please note, if you make this payment before the 28th of each month, it will be adjusted against your upcoming EPI (EQUATED PERIODIC INSTALMENT (EPI)). However, if the payment is made between the 28th and the 1st, it will be adjusted in your EPI (EQUATED PERIODIC INSTALMENT (EPI)) for the following month. To proceed with an advance payment, kindly use the link provided below., CTA Label: Loan details page, Android CTA link: bajajsuperapp://relations/loan, IOS CTA link: bajajsuperapp://relations/loan, Web CTA link: https://bajajfinserv.in/myaccountlogin?Source=Loan

question: What are the ECS return charges?
answer: We understand your concern regarding ECS return charges. These charges are applied by your bank, not Bajaj Finance, when a transaction processed through ECS is returned or rejected due to insufficient balance in your bank account. For further clarification on these charges, we kindly recommend reaching out to your bank directly. They will be able to provide you with more detailed information.

question: How does a part payment affect my loan?
answer: Making part payment will either reduce the tenure of your loan or the EPI (EQUATED PERIODIC INSTALMENT (EPI)) amount in subsequent EMIs.

question: Can I change the due date of my EMI?
answer: I'm sorry for any inconvenience, but the EPI (EQUATED PERIODIC INSTALMENT (EPI)) due date of your loan is fixed and cannot be changed.

question: Can I split my next month's EMI into two installments?
answer: I apologize for any inconvenience, but the option to split your EPI (EQUATED PERIODIC INSTALMENT (EPI)) is not available.

question: Why can't I pay an advanced EMI?
answer: Please note that during the EIP period, the Advance Instalment option is disabled if you try to pay your monthly EMI. question: Why was ECS hit multiple times in a month?
answer: If there isn't enough money in your account to cover ECS payment, attempts may be made multiple times to debit your account. It's important to ensure you have sufficient funds in your account to avoid such situations.

question: What is the current overdue amount on my loan account?
answer: Check customer_data before answering the question. If total_over_due is not null:  Inform the customer:  The overdue amount for your loan is <total_over_due>. This figure includes penal charges, bounce fees, installment dues, and other applicable charges. For the exact amount payable along with detailed charges, please refer to your Statement of Account (SOA) letter available in the document center. If total_over_due is null:  Inform the customer:  Please check your loan’s overdue amount by referring to your Statement of Account (SOA) document available in the document center., CTA Label: Document center, Android CTA link: bajajsuperapp://documenation/documentcenter, IOS CTA link: bajajsuperapp://documenation/documentcenter, Web CTA link: https://bajajfinserv.in/myaccountlogin?Source=Document
